pkgmetadata.longdescription: Crow Translate is a simple and lightweight translator that allows translating and speaking text using the Mozhi translation API. It features global shortcuts, text-to-speech, OCR via Tesseract, and a popup translation window.

use.flag: Enable Piper neural text-to-speech support (requires onnxruntime and bundled espeak-ng)
Enable improved Wayland integration via KWayland
